rolloutStrategy: Create all policies in report-only mode first. Enable CA-001, then CA-003, then CA-002 after MFA registration is confirmed for test users.

policies.name: CA-001-Block-Legacy-Auth
policies.description: Block legacy authentication protocols (POP, IMAP, SMTP AUTH, older clients).
policies.rationale: Legacy auth bypasses Conditional Access. Blocking is baseline Zero Trust hygiene.

policies.name: CA-002-Require-MFA-All-Users
policies.description: Require MFA for all users accessing cloud apps.
policies.rationale: Phishing-resistant authentication baseline for all workforce identities.

policies.name: CA-003-Require-MFA-Admins
policies.description: Require MFA for all directory roles with strict session sign-in frequency.
policies.rationale: Privileged identities require stronger session controls than standard users.

policies.name: CA-004-Block-Unknown-Locations-Admins
policies.description: Block admin sign-ins from locations outside trusted lab countries.
policies.rationale: Optional lab policy demonstrating location-based admin protection. Configure trusted named locations first.

portalSteps: Entra ID > Protection > Conditional Access > New policy
Assign SG-EXCLUDE-BreakGlass to exclusions for every policy
Start in Report-only; review Sign-in logs for 48 hours
